I was 35 when I was diagnosed, I had been having these dreamy episodes and odd feelings for 10 years. I repeatedly visited my G.P(s) as I knew something wasn't quite right but I was told time & time again I was having panic attacks which made sense as these episodes were scary. It was only after a minor car accident that I stopped driving and we scraped enough money together to have a private consultation. Within 10 minutes, the consultant said I had epilepsy. It was a huge shock and very worrying. After 2 years of trying different medication, I was seizure free for over 1 year and got my licence back.

Let him be . Jake R.I.P

As a talented footballer, entertaining reality star and handsome model there was a time when Jake Hall had the world at his feet.  Yet in a tragic turn of events, Jake - who found fame on TOWIE in 2015 - was found dead in a Spanish villa with head injuries in the early hours of Wednesday morning after 'smashing into a glass door' during a party. Hours before he died, Jake had shared a social media post in which he vowed to 'remember the good things' in a life that was 'b******s'.

Zack Polanski said he did not believe 'any country' had a right to exist when he was grilled on the legitimacy of the state of Israel. The comment, in an interview with ITV's Peston programme, came as Mr Polanski - who is Jewish - tries to quell concerns about anti-Semitism in his party. Yesterday the London assembly member doubled down on criticism of way the police detained the Golders Green stabbings suspect last week, saying he had been 'traumatised' by the footage. He also said Palestine is 'one of the things' on the ballot paper for the local elections - despite being 2,000 miles from the UK and not the responsibility of English councils.

Zero Bisibility, Visabilly, Zero Visibilly. Zero Visibility!

Joggers were forced to flee after a giant ash cloud suddenly raced toward them following a partial collapse at a volcano in the Philippines.  Footage captured the moment a huge wall of thick black smoke rolled across the road near the Mayon volcano in Legazpi City over the weekend, as runners desperately tried to escape. The video initially showed the group laughing and filming before panic set in as the ash cloud drew closer.

  • 1 video
